// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package href provides generators for datastar anchor hypertext references.
// Use these in templates instead of hardcoding URLs.
package href

import "strings"

// UserPost references /user/{name}/post/{$}
func UserPost(name string, query QueryUserPost) string {
	anyQuery := query.Sort != ""

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("/user/")
	+len(name)
	+len("/post/")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}

	// n = number of query params already accounted for (for '&')
	n := 0

	if query.Sort != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		n++
		l += len("sort=") + len(query.Sort)
	}
	_ = n

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("/user/")
	b.WriteString(name)
	b.WriteString("/post/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}

	n = 0

	if query.Sort != "" {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("sort=")
		b.WriteString(query.Sort)
	}

	return b.String()
}

// QueryUserPost is the query parameters for UserPost
type QueryUserPost struct {
	Sort string `query:"sort"`
}
